Jonathan H. Bornstein, for Plaintiff/Opposing party

Ruling:
Hearing held on Defendant Claudia Holm's Motion to compel answers to discovery. Plaintiff shall file responses with original verification attached by 5:00 PM on July 31,2006. Request for Sanctions is denied. Comm. Paul Slavit.
